subject: Last chance to register for Designing Interfaces online course
body:
Greetings from New Hampshire!

Please join us for the upcoming Webinar series "Designing Effective
Interfaces for STELLA and iThink Models" beginning Friday, November 2nd
at 11:00 AM EST. We have a few spaces left and are looking forward to
your participation in our newest online course.

We have designed this four session Webinar series to help you create
models that will have an impact. You’ll learn how to develop more
effective learning labs and management flight simulators, so that you
can:

- Provide scenario planning tools for your clients

- Develop and implement dynamic scorecards/dashboards for your
	organization

- Build self-guided learning labs for your students

We'll provide you with the tools and techniques to convert your models
into compelling and engaging experiential products. Plus, we'll use
sample models of real world situations to demonstrate the concepts.

Each session will include:

- Handouts that highlight main learning points

- Homework with instructor feedback (optional, of course...but helpful!)

- Tutorials that walk you through the mechanics of STELLA and iThink

- Access to the instructor throughout the course

- Online discussion forum for sharing ideas with other class participants


If for some reason you must miss a session, recordings of each session
can be downloaded afterwards. Recordings are also useful as guides and
reinforcement of the materials and tutorials presented during each
session.

To learn more or to register, visit http://www.iseesystems.com/interface

If you have questions regarding content or applicability to your
situation, please do not hesitate to email Chris Soderquist at
chris.soderquist@pontifexconsulting.com

We look forward to seeing you in cyberspace.

Sincerely,

Chris Soderquist
Pontifex Consulting

Joanne Egner
isee systems, inc.


**********************************************************

To unsubscribe from the isee mailing list, please visit this link:
http://www.iseesystems.com/aspx/remove.aspx?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com
